scripts.build: vite build && powershell -Command "if (Test-Path 'dist/fonts') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'dist/fonts' }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'dist/fonts' | Out-Null; Copy-Item 'fonts/HarmonyOS_Sans_SC_Regular.ttf','fonts/HarmonyOS_Sans_SC_Medium.ttf','fonts/HarmonyOS_Sans_SC_Bold.ttf' 'dist/fonts/'"
